videos.headline: Iowa State scores on its 1st drive with a Carson Hansen TD
videos.description: Iowa State's Rocco Becht lofts one into the end zone to Carson Hansen for a touchdown on the Cyclones' first drive.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Iowa State scores on its 1st drive with a Carson Hansen TD) 2024/12/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Arizona State comes up big on 4th-and-1 with a 63-yard reception
videos.description: Sam Leavitt goes deep to Melquan Stovall for a 63-yard reception on 4th-and-1 for Arizona State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Arizona State comes up big on 4th-and-1 with a 63-yard reception) 2024/12/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Sam Leavitt takes it himself for a go-ahead TD in the 1st quarter
videos.description: Sam Leavitt rushes into the end zone for a 3-yard Arizona State touchdown for the go-ahead score.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Sam Leavitt takes it himself for a go-ahead TD in the 1st quarter) 2024/12/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kenny Dillingham's face says it all on near disaster for ASU
videos.description: Arizona State coach Kenny Dillingham is shocked after Cam Skattebo just nearly avoids a turnover in the red zone.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kenny Dillingham's face says it all on near disaster for ASU) 2024/12/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cam Skattebo fights off multiple defenders for a 47-yard 1st down
videos.description: Cam Skattebo avoids multiple tackles on a 47-yard run for an Arizona State first down.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cam Skattebo fights off multiple defenders for a 47-yard 1st down) 2024/12/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cam Skattebo flashes the Heisman pose after 2nd-quarter TD
videos.description: Cam Skattebo flashes the Heisman pose after rushing in for his first touchdown against Iowa State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cam Skattebo flashes the Heisman pose after 2nd-quarter TD) 2024/12/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Malik McClain comes up with an incredible 43-yard reception
videos.description: Sam Leavitt airs it out downfield to Malik McClain for a diving 43-yard reception for Arizona State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Malik McClain comes up with an incredible 43-yard reception) 2024/12/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cam Skattebo's 53-yard run later sets up his 2nd rushing TD
videos.description: Arizona State's Cam Skattebo takes off for a 53-yard gain, later setting up his second rushing touchdown of the first half.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cam Skattebo's 53-yard run later sets up his 2nd rushing TD) 2024/12/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Sam Leavitt finds Xavier Guillory for an 8-yard TD
videos.description: Sam Leavitt passes to Xavier Guillory for an 8-yard touchdown to increase Arizona State's lead in the third quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Sam Leavitt finds Xavier Guillory for an 8-yard TD) 2024/12/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Rocco Becht throws tough-luck INT off offensive lineman's helmet
videos.description: Iowa State QB Rocco Becht is picked off by Keith Abney II to give Arizona State the ball back in the third quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Rocco Becht throws tough-luck INT off offensive lineman's helmet) 2024/12/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Sam Leavitt and Xavier Guillory connect for 2nd-straight TD of the 3rd quarter
videos.description: Arizona State's Sam Leavitt lofts it up to Xavier Guillory for the pair's second-straight touchdown of the third quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Sam Leavitt and Xavier Guillory connect for 2nd-straight TD of the 3rd quarter) 2024/12/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Another Iowa State turnover leads to Cam Skattebo's 3rd TD
videos.description: Arizona State recovers an Iowa State turnover, leading to Cam Skattebo's third rushing touchdown of the game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Another Iowa State turnover leads to Cam Skattebo's 3rd TD) 2024/12/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Rocco Becht and Jaylin Noel connect for a 25-yard Iowa State TD
videos.description: Iowa State tries to cut deficit late in the fourth quarter with a Jaylin Noel 25-yard receiving touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Rocco Becht and Jaylin Noel connect for a 25-yard Iowa State TD) 2024/12/07 ESHEET
